title: AI Backend Engineering Intern
description: Build and maintain FastAPI microservices for LLM inference and data ingestion. Integrate ChromaDB for vector storage. Write embedding generation scripts using sentence-transformers. Help design REST APIs consumed by frontend dashboards. Collaborate with AI research team on prompt engineering. Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in CS or AI.
responsibilities: Build FastAPI microservices for LLM inference pipelines
Integrate ChromaDB and Pinecone for vector storage
Write Python scripts for embedding generation
Design REST APIs for frontend dashboards
Write unit tests and integration tests
requirements: Familiarity with LLM concepts and RAG

title: RAG Engineer
description: Design and implement RAG pipelines using LangChain and LlamaIndex. Build document ingestion systems with chunking strategies and embedding pipelines. Optimize ChromaDB and Pinecone for production-scale retrieval. Implement hybrid retrieval combining dense and sparse search. Evaluate retrieval quality using standard metrics.
responsibilities: Design RAG pipelines using LangChain and LlamaIndex
Build document ingestion and chunking systems
Optimize vector DB collections for production scale
Implement hybrid retrieval (dense + sparse/BM25)
Monitor retrieval pipelines using LangSmith
requirements: 1-3 years backend or AI/ML engineering experience
Hands-on experience with LangChain or LlamaIndex

title: LLMOps Engineer
description: Design and manage LLM serving infrastructure using vLLM and TGI. Build prompt management systems with versioning and A/B testing. Implement LLM observability pipelines tracking latency, cost, and quality. Create automated evaluation pipelines using LangSmith. Manage model fine-tuning workflows using LoRA on cloud infrastructure.
responsibilities: Design LLM serving infrastructure with vLLM and TGI
Build prompt versioning and management systems
Implement LLM observability and cost monitoring
Create automated evaluation pipelines
Manage LoRA fine-tuning workflows on AWS/GCP

title: AI Platform Engineer
description: Build and maintain the internal AI platform including embedding services, vector DB management, and LLM gateways. Design scalable ingestion pipelines for multi-modal data. Build developer tooling: SDKs, CLI tools, and internal APIs. Implement semantic caching layers to reduce LLM costs. Own the vector database infrastructure at scale.
responsibilities: Build internal AI platform with embedding services and vector DB management
Design scalable ingestion pipelines for text and PDF data
Build developer SDKs and CLI tools for AI teams
Implement semantic caching for LLM cost reduction
Contribute to open-source AI infrastructure tools

title: ML Infrastructure Engineer
description: Build and maintain ML training and inference pipelines. Design data pipelines for feature engineering and model training. Implement model serving infrastructure using FastAPI and Docker. Build monitoring systems for model drift and latency. Create CI/CD pipelines for model deployment using GitHub Actions.
responsibilities: Build ML training and inference pipelines
Design data pipelines for feature engineering
Implement model serving with FastAPI and Docker
Build model monitoring for drift and latency
Create CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions
requirements: 1-2 years software or data engineering experience

title: Agentic AI Engineer
description: Build autonomous AI agents using LangGraph for multi-step task orchestration. Design supervisor-worker agent architectures for complex workflows. Implement tool-use patterns allowing agents to call external APIs. Build memory and context management systems for long-running agents. Create agent evaluation frameworks to measure task completion quality.
responsibilities: Build autonomous AI agents with LangGraph
Design multi-agent supervisor-worker architectures
Implement tool-use for external API integration
Build agent memory and context management systems
Create agent evaluation and testing frameworks
requirements: LangGraph or similar agent framework experience

title: NLP Engineer Intern
description: Work on NLP pipelines for text classification, named entity recognition, and semantic similarity. Fine-tune transformer models using Hugging Face. Build text preprocessing and feature extraction pipelines. Implement information extraction systems from unstructured documents. Contribute to model evaluation frameworks.
responsibilities: Build NLP pipelines for text classification and NER
Fine-tune transformer models with Hugging Face
Implement text preprocessing pipelines
Build information extraction from unstructured documents
Contribute to model evaluation frameworks
requirements: Currently pursuing CS, AI, or Linguistics degree

title: Vector Search Engineer
description: Design and optimize vector search systems for production workloads handling millions of documents. Benchmark and compare vector database solutions (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, FAISS). Implement Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) algorithms. Build hybrid search combining semantic and keyword retrieval. Optimize indexing strategies for low-latency retrieval at scale.
responsibilities: Design production vector search systems at scale
Benchmark vector database solutions
Implement ANN algorithms and indexing strategies
Build hybrid search (semantic + keyword)
Optimize retrieval latency for production SLAs
requirements: Experience with at least one vector database

title: AI Research Engineer
description: Conduct research on improving LLM performance for domain-specific applications. Implement and evaluate fine-tuning techniques (LoRA, QLoRA, full fine-tuning). Build evaluation benchmarks for domain-specific LLM tasks. Explore RLHF and DPO alignment techniques. Publish findings in internal technical reports and external venues.
responsibilities: Research LLM performance improvements for specific domains
Implement and evaluate LoRA and QLoRA fine-tuning
Build evaluation benchmarks for LLM tasks
Explore RLHF and DPO alignment techniques
Write technical reports and research papers
requirements: Masters or strong BS in CS/AI/ML

title: Backend Engineer — AI Products
description: Build backend APIs for AI-powered product features. Integrate LLM capabilities into existing product surfaces. Design and maintain PostgreSQL schemas for AI feature data. Build caching layers using Redis to optimize LLM response latency. Deploy and monitor backend services on AWS using Docker and GitHub Actions.
responsibilities: Build REST APIs for AI product features
Integrate LLM capabilities into product backend
Design PostgreSQL schemas for AI data
Build Redis caching for LLM response optimization
Deploy backend services on AWS with Docker
requirements: LangChain or similar LLM framework knowledge

title: Generative AI Engineer
description: Build generative AI features using the latest LLM APIs (Gemini, Claude, GPT-4). Design and implement prompt engineering pipelines with versioning and evaluation. Integrate multi-modal models for text, image, and audio generation. Build content safety and moderation layers. A/B test prompts and models to optimize output quality.
responsibilities: Build generative AI features using Gemini, Claude, GPT-4
Design prompt engineering pipelines with versioning
Integrate multi-modal models for text and image
Build content safety and moderation layers
A/B test prompts to optimize generation quality

title: AI Intern — LangGraph Workflows
description: Join our workflow automation team to build AI-powered business workflows using LangGraph. Implement graph-based orchestration for multi-step AI tasks. Build state machines for document processing pipelines. Integrate tools and APIs as LangGraph nodes. Write tests and documentation for workflow modules.
responsibilities: Build AI workflow orchestration with LangGraph
Implement graph-based multi-step task pipelines
Build state management for document processing
Integrate external APIs as LangGraph tool nodes
Write tests and documentation
requirements: Interest in agentic AI and workflow automation
Currently pursuing a CS or AI degree

title: Data Engineer — ML Pipelines
description: Build and maintain data pipelines that feed ML training and inference systems. Design ETL workflows using Apache Airflow. Implement feature engineering pipelines using Spark and pandas. Build data quality monitoring and alerting systems. Manage data lake and warehouse infrastructure on AWS.
responsibilities: Build data pipelines for ML training systems
Design ETL workflows with Apache Airflow
Implement feature engineering with Spark
Build data quality monitoring systems
Manage data lake infrastructure on AWS

title: Prompt Engineer
description: Design, test, and optimize prompts for production LLM applications. Build prompt libraries with versioning and A/B testing infrastructure. Implement automated evaluation pipelines for prompt quality assessment. Work closely with product teams to translate requirements into effective prompts. Research and apply advanced prompting techniques (chain-of-thought, few-shot, tool use).
responsibilities: Design and optimize prompts for production LLM apps
Build prompt versioning and A/B testing infrastructure
Implement automated prompt evaluation pipelines
Research advanced prompting techniques
Collaborate with product teams on LLM features
requirements: Strong analytical thinking and writing skills
LangSmith or similar evaluation tools experience

title: Full Stack AI Developer
description: Build full-stack AI applications from backend APIs to polished frontend interfaces. Develop FastAPI backends with LangChain integration. Build Next.js frontends with real-time streaming LLM responses. Design intuitive UIs for AI features using Tailwind CSS and ShadCN. Maintain PostgreSQL databases and ChromaDB vector collections.
responsibilities: Build FastAPI backends with LangChain integration
Develop Next.js frontends with streaming LLM responses
Design AI-focused UIs with Tailwind and ShadCN
Maintain PostgreSQL and ChromaDB infrastructure
Own full-stack features end-to-end

title: ML Engineer Intern
description: Work with the ML team on training and evaluating models for classification and regression tasks. Implement feature engineering pipelines using pandas and scikit-learn. Train neural networks using PyTorch. Run experiments using Jupyter notebooks and track results with MLflow. Contribute to model evaluation and testing frameworks.
responsibilities: Train and evaluate ML models for classification tasks
Implement feature engineering pipelines
Train neural networks with PyTorch
Run and track experiments with MLflow
Contribute to model evaluation frameworks

title: AI Safety and Evaluation Engineer
description: Build evaluation frameworks for LLM safety, fairness, and quality. Design red-teaming workflows to identify model failure modes. Implement automated evaluation pipelines using LangSmith. Research alignment techniques and their practical applications. Build harm detection and content moderation systems. Collaborate with the research team on safety benchmarks.
responsibilities: Build LLM evaluation frameworks for safety and quality
Design red-teaming workflows for model testing
Implement automated evaluation with LangSmith
Research alignment and safety techniques

title: Knowledge Graph and RAG Engineer
description: Build knowledge graph-enhanced RAG systems for improved retrieval accuracy. Design and populate Neo4j knowledge graphs from unstructured documents. Implement entity extraction and relationship mapping pipelines. Build graph-RAG hybrid retrieval combining structured and semantic search. Create APIs for knowledge graph querying and RAG integration.
responsibilities: Build knowledge graph-enhanced RAG systems
Design and populate Neo4j graphs from documents
Implement entity extraction and relationship mapping
Build graph-RAG hybrid retrieval systems
Create APIs for knowledge graph querying

Implement infrastructure-as-code using Terraform on AWS and GCP. Build CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment. Set up monitoring, alerting, and observability using Prometheus and Grafana.

Design containerized ML model serving deployments
Implement Terraform infrastructure-as-code
